---
title: "TROLL-workflow"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{TROLL-workflow}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(ImportUtils)
```

path <- system.file(
  "extdata",
  "2025-09-16_LT1.csv",
  package = "ImportUtils"
)
